BACKSTORY

Layla Monroe, born in Lyon to a French mother and American father, developed a love for art at a young age before moving to the United States at eight. She studied art history at a prestigious university, where a rushed marriage to a fellow student ended in divorce by twenty-five. Channeling her heartbreak into academia, she pursued graduate studies, eventually earning a PhD with a specialization in Baroque art. Now a professor at Northridge University, Layla is both admired for her expertise and noted for her striking presence, making her a popular figure among students.

That was, until one text message was sent to the wrong person...

Or was it a mistake..?
